name: Noland Taylor
text: One of the best places to study and get some work done. Very quiet and a lot of more serious students.
title: Wilson Library

name: MJ Worldwide
text: This is a wonderful library. I was able to get all the help I needed and more. I highly recommend going online and making an appointment if you’re conducting research. All rules were firm yet necessary to maintain these priceless materials. Overall, a great experience for an external researcher and I look forward to coming back again!
title: Wilson Library

name: Nicole Caldwell
text: I recommend studying here before you graduate! It's absolutely beautiful inside.  I wish I had studied at this library more while I was a student, instead of Davis and the other libraries.
title: Wilson Library

name: grace north
text: Very beautiful building on campus. I love the stone and think it stands out from other buildings. I love sitting on the cool steps and enjoying a snack in the sunshine. There is also a nice museum inside with some NC history.
title: Wilson Library

name: Mocha
text: Nice, calm, quiet. The second floor fountains used to have a wonderful metallic taste to them but now they taste bland.
title: Wilson Library

name: Susan Davis
text: I love love love Wilson. I just wish that it was open later.
title: Wilson Library

name: Gary Beck Dallaghan
text: Always a great place to work. It's nice seeing all of the students taking advantage of the reading room.
title: Wilson Library

name: Jonny Whinna
text: Very much enjoyed studying in this library. Made me feel important. Shoutouts to my friend Ally who was always down to study here as well. Great atmosphere
title: Wilson Library

name: Amalia Mammadova
text: This library has weird hours, but it's easily the best place to study! Half this place is like a museum, so definitely check out the library in its entirety. You definitely won't be disappointed by the history of it and the campus of UNC either!
title: Wilson Library

name: Tastyfish
text: Like Hogwarts but with less ghosts.
title: Wilson Library

name: J
text: Worth visiting if you're on campus. Excellent place to study, dim lit, marble, wood, portraits, rare books etc lots of history. Beautiful building
title: Wilson Library

name: Zac Curtis
text: Awesome Place to study and it is never crowded!
title: Wilson Library
